sanskrit:
अथवा योगिनामेव कुले भवति धीमताम्।
एतद्धि दुर्लभतरं लोके जन्म यदीदृशम्॥
transliteration: athavā yogināṃ eva kule bhavati dhīmatām | etad dhi durlabhataraṃ loke janma yad īdṛśam ||
literal_meaning: Or he is born in a family of yogis who are endowed with wisdom; such a birth is most rare in this world.
contextual_meaning: After death, the yogic mind-stream gravitates toward environments saturated with contemplative intelligence, giving it a head-start in the next life.
psychological_state: Post-traumatic growth: the psyche seeks a womb that mirrors its hard-won self-regulation skills, turning prior practice into an attachment secure-base.
trigger_scenario: A meditator who lost everything in burnout discovers her new team is full of seasoned mindfulness teachers; she feels both lucky and afraid she won’t keep up.
anchor_text: Your disciplined mind now shapes your next birth.
